title: Mushoku Tensei Jobless Reincarnation Custom GUI Pack
description: Mushoku Tensei Jobless Reincarnation Custom GUI Pack
body: **![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/hBmCUPA.png)** **Introduction:** This GUI-only resource pack seamlessly integrates with other resource packs. Place it on top of your existing pack to experience a customized interface inspired by the world of "Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation." I've updated the hot bar for a more immersive experience and experimented with adding different pictures to each container. The chosen color palette includes Orange and Pink, but I'm open to suggestions for alternative color schemes. Feel free to share your preferences, such as Pink and Orange or any other colors, and I'll consider them for future updates. **Community Engagement:** Join our Discord server to suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in anime discussions, and have the chance to win Discord Nitro giveaways every month. [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Feature Highlights** - **Settings:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/aucWtd9.png) - **Hud:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/53g0hq3.png) - **Stonecutter:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/NYmb7xy.png) - **Chest:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/VkhhA8F.png) - **Crafting Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/QbnwHe4.png) - **Loom:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/eaBmNGh.png) - **Beacon Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/NcviBm7.png) - **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/RWawqIh.png) **Additional Resources:** - Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listarmc.com/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and participate in anime discussions. **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
